raw:
```json
{
  "score": 3,
  "anchor": "Clean enough",
  "rationale": "Backend has clear layering: policy/ (pure, 84 lines, all business constants single-sourced), services/ (imports policy + errors, handles DB + business rules), http/ (routes, middleware, schemas). Domain errors are a small named hierarchy (ConflictError, ForbiddenError, NotFoundError, PaymentRequiredError) used consistently. Frontend has clear pages/, components/, api/ split with API types in api/types.ts. Madge reports zero cycles and zero orphans. No source file exceeds 300 lines (largest: MemberDetailPage.tsx at 272 lines). No god-files. However, Level 4 is not met because: (1) services call raw db.prepare() directly with inline SQL rather than using a thin DB-access typed query abstraction, (2) frontend is organized by technical role (components/, pages/, api/) not by feature (e.g., checkout/, members/), and (3) frontend and backend maintain separate types.ts files with no shared workspace or generated client, meaning types are not in a single source of truth."
}
```

parsed.rationale: Backend has clear layering: policy/ (pure, 84 lines, all business constants single-sourced), services/ (imports policy + errors, handles DB + business rules), http/ (routes, middleware, schemas). Domain errors are a small named hierarchy (ConflictError, ForbiddenError, NotFoundError, PaymentRequiredError) used consistently. Frontend has clear pages/, components/, api/ split with API types in api/types.ts. Madge reports zero cycles and zero orphans. No source file exceeds 300 lines (largest: MemberDetailPage.tsx at 272 lines). No god-files. However, Level 4 is not met because: (1) services call raw db.prepare() directly with inline SQL rather than using a thin DB-access typed query abstraction, (2) frontend is organized by technical role (components/, pages/, api/) not by feature (e.g., checkout/, members/), and (3) frontend and backend maintain separate types.ts files with no shared workspace or generated client, meaning types are not in a single source of truth.
